test-code.description: Failure: Class with @InvocableVariable and only a parameterized constructor
Pass: Class with @InvocableVariable using implicit default constructor
Pass: Class with @InvocableVariable and explicit no-arg constructor alongside parameterized constructor
Failure: Class with global @InvocableVariable but private no-arg constructor
Pass: Normal class with a parameterized constructor but no @InvocableVariable annotations
